adds.rationale: Rocket Lab achieved the first mid-air helicopter catch of a returning orbital booster in May 2022, posted Q1 revenue of $40.7M (+124% YoY), and signed a multi-launch HawkEye 360 contract in April 2022 — concrete early-surge commercial milestones for the rockets wave with no comparable US-listed pure-play available.

news_evidence.summary: Rocket Lab secures multi-launch contract with HawkEye 360 for three Electron missions including the inaugural Wallops Island launch.
Rocket Lab 'There And Back Again' deploys 34 satellites and achieves first-ever mid-air helicopter catch of a returning booster.
Rocket Lab Q1 2022: $40.7M revenue (+124% YoY); Space Systems +1,873% YoY post-SolAero; Q2 guidance $51-54M.

adds.rationale: Russia's invasion triggered a structural inflection in European nuclear policy (EU taxonomy inclusion Feb 2022, REPowerEU May 2022) and drove uranium spot to an 11-year high of $64.61 in April 2022, marking early-surge conditions for the fission renaissance; NLR is the broadest liquid vehicle for the theme.

news_evidence.summary: European Commission adopts draft delegated act classifying nuclear as sustainable under EU taxonomy, reversing a major headwind.
Uranium spot surges from $43.94 in late Feb to $64.61 in mid-April 2022, an 11-year high, as Western utilities scramble for non-Russian sources.
European Commission launches REPowerEU to end dependence on Russian fossil fuels by 2030; recognizes nuclear baseload as a key energy-security pillar.

adds.rationale: North American robot orders hit an all-time quarterly record in Q1 2022 (+28% YoY) with labor shortage cited as the primary driver, and a Deloitte survey projected a 2.1M-worker manufacturing gap by 2030; BOTZ adds early-wave robotics exposure diversifying away from the starter's software/semiconductor AI concentration.

news_evidence.summary: A3 reports North American robot sales hit an all-time quarterly record in Q1 2022: 11,595 units at $646M, +28% YoY, labor shortages the primary driver.
Deloitte/Manufacturing Institute project a 2.1M US manufacturing-worker shortage by 2030, accelerating automation over hiring.
Global X BOTZ AUM exceeds $2B, holding industrial-automation leaders Fanuc, Yaskawa, Keyence — a broad liquid robotics basket.

rationale_overall: The starter is a concentrated current-wave bet (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA in AI, plus SPY) with zero coverage of the thesis's named next waves. This rebalance fills the three remaining slots to reach max_watchlist_size of 8: RKLB (rockets, first booster helicopter catch in Q2 2022), NLR (nuclear, EU policy reversal plus uranium at an 11-year high), and BOTZ (robotics, record North American robot orders). No removes — the starter retains full thesis validity and SPY cushions the 2022 bear.
